name: Falafel Tahini Wrap
instructions: Warm falafel in oven 8 minutes.
Mix tahini with lemon juice, garlic, and water into sauce.
Warm wrap; fill with lettuce, cucumber, tomato, red onion.
Add falafel; drizzle tahini sauce and wrap tightly.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra falafel (+2 pieces) for more plant protein and iron on menstrual days.

name: Korean BBQ Beef Bowl
instructions: Marinate beef in gochujang, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, and pear 10 minutes.
Grill or pan-fry beef 2 minutes per side; slice.
Build bowl: rice base, sliced beef, cucumber strips.
Garnish with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add a fried egg on top for extra protein and richness.

name: Tuna Avocado Rice Bowl
instructions: Drain tuna; season with soy sauce and sesame oil.
Build bowl: rice base, tuna, avocado, edamame, cucumber.
Garnish with sesame seeds, pickled ginger, and torn nori.

macro_adjustment_rules: Swap brown rice for cauliflower rice to reduce carbs by ~40g on lower-carb days.

name: Crispy Tofu Thai Peanut Bowl
instructions: Pan-fry tofu cubes in sesame oil 4 minutes per side until crispy.
Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, lime, sriracha, and garlic into sauce.
Build bowl: rice base, tofu, carrot, edamame.
Drizzle peanut sauce; garnish with spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 10g extra peanut butter for a richer, higher-fat version on rest days.

name: Harissa Chicken Wrap
instructions: Slice grilled chicken; toss in harissa paste.
Mix yogurt with lemon juice and mint as sauce.
Fill wrap with lettuce, cucumber, tomato.
Add harissa chicken; drizzle yogurt sauce and wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g crumbled feta for extra calcium and flavour.

name: Salmon Poke Bowl
instructions: Cube salmon; marinate in soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar 5 minutes.
Press rice into bowl base.
Arrange salmon, avocado, edamame, cucumber on rice.
Top with sesame seeds, pickled ginger, and nori strips.

macro_adjustment_rules: Use cauliflower rice to reduce carbs by ~45g for lower-carb days while keeping the same toppings.

name: Greek Lamb Pita Wrap
instructions: Season lamb with garlic, cumin; cook 4 minutes.
Mix yogurt with mint and lemon juice as tzatziki-style sauce.
Warm pitta; fill with lamb, cucumber, tomato, red onion.
Drizzle sauce; fold and serve.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 20g feta crumbles for extra calcium and Mediterranean flavour.

name: Chipotle Chicken Rice Bowl
instructions: Marinate chicken in chipotle sauce; grill 4 minutes per side; slice.
Build bowl: rice, black beans, corn, red onion.
Top with sliced chicken.
Dress with lime juice, olive oil, and coriander.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g avocado for healthy fats and creaminess (+64 kcal).

name: Miso Glazed Salmon Bowl
instructions: Mix miso and mirin into glaze.
Coat salmon; bake at 200°C 12 minutes.
Build bowl: rice, steamed broccoli, edamame.
Place glazed salmon on top; drizzle sesame oil.
Garnish with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Use soba noodles instead of rice for a different texture and extra fibre.

name: Bahn Mi Inspired Wrap
instructions: Slice grilled chicken; season with soy sauce.
Spread mayo and sriracha on wrap.
Layer carrot, cucumber, pickled daikon, jalapeño, and coriander.
Add chicken; wrap tightly.

macro_adjustment_rules: Use tofu instead of chicken for a plant-based version with similar macros.

name: Quinoa Power Bowl with Roasted Veg
instructions: Roast vegetables and chickpeas at 200°C for 20 minutes.
Build bowl: quinoa base, roasted veg and chickpeas.
Whisk tahini, lemon, garlic, and water into dressing.
Drizzle dressing; scatter pumpkin seeds.

macro_adjustment_rules: Prep 3 bowls at once — keeps refrigerated 4 days.

name: BBQ Turkey Ranch Wrap
instructions: Toss turkey slices in BBQ sauce; warm in pan 2 minutes.
Spread ranch dressing on wrap.
Layer lettuce, tomato, red onion, and pickles.
Add BBQ turkey; wrap tightly.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 30g avocado for healthy fats and extra creaminess.

name: Smoked Salmon Cucumber Sushi Bowl
instructions: Press rice into bowl.
Add smoked salmon, cucumber, and avocado.
Dot cream cheese around the bowl.
Tear nori into pieces; add on top.
Season with soy sauce, sesame seeds, and pickled ginger.

macro_adjustment_rules: Swap sushi rice for cauliflower rice to save ~160 kcal on lower-carb days.

name: Lentil Roasted Veg Buddha Bowl
instructions: Roast vegetables at 200°C for 25 minutes.
Build bowl: quinoa base, mixed greens, lentils, roasted veg.
Whisk tahini, lemon, garlic into dressing.
Drizzle over bowl.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 50g feta crumbles for extra protein and calcium.

name: Jerk Chicken Rice Bowl
instructions: Coat chicken in jerk seasoning and olive oil; grill 5 minutes per side.
Rest and slice chicken.
Build bowl: rice, black beans, mango salsa.
Top with jerk chicken; dress with lime juice and herbs.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g avocado and extra mango salsa for more tropical flavour.

name: Egg & Avocado Breakfast Wrap
instructions: Scramble eggs in olive oil 2 minutes.
Warm wrap; spread smashed avocado.
Layer spinach, cherry tomatoes, and scrambled eggs.
Crumble feta; add hot sauce and wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add smoked salmon for extra protein and omega-3 fats.

name: Thai Chicken Glass Noodle Bowl
instructions: Grill and slice chicken.
Cook and cool glass noodles.
Make dressing: fish sauce, lime, chilli, sesame oil.
Toss noodles with carrot, cucumber, and bean sprouts.
Top with chicken and peanuts; dress and garnish with coriander.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra peanuts for +30 kcal and richer texture.

name: Pulled Pork BBQ Wrap
instructions: Season shredded pork with BBQ sauce; warm in pan.
Mix coleslaw with mayo and lime juice.
Fill wrap with coleslaw, pickles, jalapeño.
Add BBQ pulled pork; wrap tightly.

macro_adjustment_rules: Use lettuce wraps instead of tortillas to reduce carbs by ~35g.

name: Sushi-Style Salmon Hand Roll Bowl
instructions: Build deconstructed hand roll bowl: rice base.
Layer smoked salmon, cucumber, avocado, and cream cheese.
Add torn nori pieces; sprinkle sesame seeds.
Serve soy sauce and wasabi on the side.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra avocado for more healthy fats and a creamier bowl.

name: Za'atar Chicken Fattoush Bowl
instructions: Coat chicken in za'atar and olive oil; grill 4 minutes per side; slice.
Build bowl: couscous base, tomato, cucumber, radishes.
Top with sliced chicken and pitta chips.
Dress with lemon juice, sumac, and mint.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g feta for extra calcium and a salty, tangy kick.

name: Prawn Cocktail Lettuce Bowl
instructions: Arrange shredded lettuce in bowl.
Add prawns, avocado, and cherry tomatoes.
Drizzle cocktail sauce and lemon juice.
Dust with paprika.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 150g cooked quinoa to create a more complete, satisfying bowl.

name: Roasted Cauliflower Turmeric Bowl
instructions: Toss cauliflower and chickpeas with turmeric, cumin, and olive oil.
Roast at 200°C 22 minutes until golden.
Build bowl: quinoa, spinach, roasted cauli and chickpeas.
Drizzle tahini-lemon dressing; top with pomegranate seeds.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 120g grilled chicken to significantly boost protein.

name: Duck Hoisin Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Slice cooked duck breast thinly.
Separate lettuce into cups.
Fill cups with duck, cucumber, and carrot.
Drizzle hoisin and sriracha.
Garnish with spring onion and sesame seeds.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra duck breast (+50g) on higher protein days.

name: Spiced Lamb Rice Bowl
instructions: Season lamb with cumin, coriander, and cinnamon; cook 5 minutes.
Build bowl: rice base, cucumber, tomato.
Top with lamb mince and yogurt.
Garnish with pine nuts and fresh mint.

macro_adjustment_rules: Reduce rice to 100g to lower carbs and bring to ~460 kcal for fat-loss days.

name: Mango Chicken Fusion Wrap
instructions: Slice grilled chicken.
Mix mayo, sriracha, and lime as sauce.
Fill wrap with red cabbage, mango, avocado.
Add chicken; drizzle sauce and coriander; wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 30g toasted coconut flakes for extra tropical flavour and healthy fats.

name: Edamame Avocado Soba Bowl
instructions: Cook soba; rinse under cold water.
Build bowl: soba base, edamame, cucumber, carrot.
Add sliced avocado.
Dress with tamari, sesame oil, rice vinegar.
Top with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 150g firm tofu for +15g protein and a heartier bowl.

name: Teriyaki Tofu Broccoli Bowl
instructions: Pan-fry tofu cubes in sesame oil 4 minutes per side.
Add garlic and teriyaki sauce; toss 1 minute.
Build bowl: rice, steamed broccoli.
Top with teriyaki tofu; garnish with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Swap rice for cauliflower rice to drop carbs by ~35g on lower-carb days.

name: Chicken Shawarma Wrap
instructions: Marinate chicken in spices and lemon juice 10 minutes.
Grill chicken 4 minutes per side; slice.
Mix yogurt with garlic as garlic sauce.
Fill flatbread with cucumber, tomato, chicken.
Drizzle tahini and garlic sauce; wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add pickled turnips and hot sauce for an authentic shawarma experience.

name: Tuna Nicoise Protein Bowl
instructions: Halve potatoes; blanch green beans 2 minutes.
Arrange greens in bowl; add potatoes, beans, cherry tomatoes.
Add drained tuna, sliced egg, and olives.
Whisk mustard, vinegar, and olive oil into dressing; drizzle.

macro_adjustment_rules: Swap potatoes for extra green beans to reduce carbs by ~15g.

name: Buffalo Chicken Lettuce Wraps
instructions: Toss shredded chicken with buffalo sauce; warm in pan 2 minutes.
Separate large lettuce leaves as cups.
Fill with buffalo chicken, celery, and carrot.
Drizzle blue cheese dressing; garnish with spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 40g avocado for healthy fats and extra satiety on rest days.

name: Soba Noodle Edamame Bowl
instructions: Cook soba noodles; drain and cool.
Blanch bok choy 1 minute.
Whisk miso, sesame oil, rice vinegar, soy, and ginger into dressing.
Build bowl: soba, bok choy, edamame.
Dress and top with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add a soft-boiled egg for +6g protein with minimal extra calories.

name: Moroccan Spiced Chicken Bowl
instructions: Coat chicken in ras el hanout and olive oil; grill 4 minutes per side; slice.
Fluff couscous; mix with chickpeas, tomatoes, and dried apricots.
Build bowl; top with chicken.
Dress with lemon juice; garnish with almonds and coriander.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra dried apricots for a sweeter, more carb-dense version on high-training days.

name: Satay Tofu Wrap
instructions: Pan-fry tofu slices 3 minutes per side until golden.
Mix peanut butter, soy sauce, lime, and sriracha into satay sauce.
Fill wrap with cucumber, carrot, red cabbage.
Add tofu; drizzle satay sauce and coriander; wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Swap tofu for chicken breast for a higher-protein, non-vegan version.

name: Mediterranean Shrimp Orzo Bowl
instructions: Sauté garlic in olive oil; add shrimp 2 minutes per side.
Add cherry tomatoes; cook 2 minutes.
Stir in spinach and orzo; remove from heat.
Crumble feta; dress with lemon juice and oregano.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra feta and olives for a richer Mediterranean version on rest days.

name: Crispy Chicken Caesar Wrap
instructions: Season chicken with olive oil; pan-fry 4 minutes per side until golden.
Slice chicken; toss with caesar dressing.
Fill wrap with romaine and croutons.
Add dressed chicken; top with parmesan; wrap.

macro_adjustment_rules: Skip croutons and use a low-carb wrap to reduce carbs by ~30g.

name: Salmon Mango Brown Rice Bowl
instructions: Pan-sear salmon 3 minutes per side; flake.
Build bowl: brown rice, edamame, cucumber, mango.
Top with salmon.
Dress with soy sauce, sesame oil, and lime juice.
Garnish with sesame seeds and coriander.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add extra mango on post-workout days for more fast carbs.

name: Turkey Avocado Protein Wrap
instructions: Mash avocado with lemon juice.
Spread avocado on wrap; add dijon mustard.
Layer spinach, turkey, tomato, and cucumber.
Roll wrap tightly.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 20g light feta for extra flavour and calcium.

name: Cauliflower Tabbouleh Bowl
instructions: Pulse cauliflower into rice-sized pieces; drain on paper towel.
Combine with chickpeas, parsley, mint, tomatoes, cucumber.
Dress generously with lemon juice, olive oil, and sumac.
Rest 5 minutes before serving.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 150g grilled chicken or salmon for a protein-rich complete meal.

name: Beef Bulgogi Rice Bowl
instructions: Marinate beef in soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, and pear 10 minutes.
Stir-fry beef over high heat 2 minutes.
Wilt spinach in residual heat.
Build bowl: rice, wilted spinach, bulgogi beef.
Garnish with sesame seeds and spring onion.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add a fried egg on top for extra protein and richness.

name: Immune-Boost Veggie Bowl
instructions: Roast sweet potato at 200°C 20 minutes.
Steam broccoli 4 minutes.
Build bowl: rice base, broccoli, sweet potato, edamame.
Whisk tahini, lemon, garlic, turmeric, ginger into dressing.
Drizzle and top with pumpkin seeds.

macro_adjustment_rules: Add 150g grilled tofu or chicken to boost protein to ~38g.
